specific_mechanism: new learnable bifurcation-gate module introducing new learnable parameters and stability-conditioned learnable bridge (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new learnable bifurcation-gate module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable parameters) implementing new learnable bifurcation-gate module; the module adds stability-conditioned learnable bridge between existing layers, creating new gating pathway that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
